calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-21-2014 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Motion And Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement
Off Calendar Aug-30-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Atty. Amanda List (510-302-6600) appearing for Plaintiff and moving party/ Defendant Kristen Michael Hansen (415-713-6778) is in Propera Persona and opposing party.

Discussion held. - Tentative ruling adopted as follows: PLAINTIFF ANNETTE HOBRUCKER's Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement is DENIED without prejudice. No competent evidence of failure to vacate under the terms of agreement provided. Thorndal Declaration Paragraph 4 and Hobrucker Declaration Paragraph 7. Additionally no Proof of Service of the Motion by actual server, i.e. Western Messenger. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk N. Bautista, Not Reported, (501)

Ntc Of Motion And Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement
Off Calendar Aug-23-2013 Continued To Aug-30-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF ANNETTE HOBRUCKER'S Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement - Transferred to Department 501, the Real Property Court, to be heard on August 30, 2013 at 9:30 am. (See Local Rule 8.10.) Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-07-2012 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On May-06-14 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

AMENDED MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Jan-19-2012 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-20-2012 Continued To May-18-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Jan-19-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. DEBORAH H. WALD OF THE LAW FIRM OF WALD & THORNDAL, TEL. NO. 648-3097 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
KRISTEN MICHAEL HANSEN, TEL. NO. 676-9310, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSSED. THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT KRISTEN HANSEN'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT IS GRANTED WITH 30 DAYS LEAVE FOR THE DEFENDANT TO FILE A RESPONSIVE PLEADING. The amended motion set for April 27, 2012 set in this Department is taken off-calendar as moot. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: Teanna Ward, CSR # 11918 =(302/HEK)
